site.name: MugreCorp
site.description: Distributed infrastructure. Eco-friendly. No data centers.

hero.tagline: Distributed computing. Eco-friendly. No data centers.
hero.title: The cloud that lives in homes, not data centers
hero.subtitle: Mini PCs in homes across Spain form a decentralized, efficient, and planet-friendly computing network.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A new way to understand infrastructure
howItWorks.step1_desc: Collaborators host Intel N100 mini PCs in their homes, leveraging their internet connection and energy.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Nodes form a resilient and decentralized network that processes in parallel without single points of failure.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Developers, SMEs, and projects access computing power on-demand, without data center costs.

products.title: Our products
products.subtitle: Infrastructure for the next generation
products.mugrecloud_desc: Distributed hosting, rendering, AI, and storage services. Pay-per-use, competitive pricing.
products.mugrenetes_desc: The distributed node network that powers all infrastructure. Resilient, flexible, gamified.

sustainability.title: Sustainability that counts
sustainability.subtitle: Every node outside a data center is CO2 not emitted

community.title: Gamified community
community.subtitle: Every host matters. Every node counts.

cta.title: Join the distributed revolution
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a developer, company, or host, there's a place for you at MugreCorp.

mugrecloud.hero_subtitle: Distributed computing on-demand. No data centers, no hidden costs.
mugrecloud.hosting_desc: Distributed web hosting with high availability and low latency across Spain.
mugrecloud.render_desc: Distributed rendering for 3D, video, and design projects without dedicated hardware.
mugrecloud.ai_desc: Distributed AI inference capacity for lightweight models and processing tasks.
mugrecloud.storage_desc: Distributed and redundant storage. Your data, replicated across multiple nodes.
mugrecloud.arch_desc: Each request is routed to the nearest available node. No bottlenecks, no single points of failure. The network adapts automatically to load and geographic distribution.

mugrenetes.hero_subtitle: The node network that makes everything possible. Distributed, resilient, gamified.
mugrenetes.what_desc: Mugrenetes is the network layer connecting all distributed MugreCorp nodes. Each Intel N100 mini PC hosted in a home is a network node, providing computing and storage capacity.
mugrenetes.resilience_desc: Physical decentralization enables fault tolerance, global outage mitigation, and a flexible network resistant to energy or geopolitical crises.
mugrenetes.gamification_desc: We promote a host community through rankings, achievements, and benefits. Each contributor strengthens the ecosystem organically and sustainably.

vibeconf.hero_subtitle: MugreCorp's AI and distributed technology event. Coming soon.
vibeconf.desc: VibeConf brings together developers, researchers, and AI enthusiasts to explore the future of distributed computing, artificial intelligence, and eco-friendly infrastructure. Register now and be among the first to secure your spot.
vibeconf.speakers_subtitle: The first confirmed speakers for VibeConf AI 2026
vibeconf.more_speakers: And more guests to be confirmed
vibeconf.register_desc: Spots are limited. Leave us your contact and we'll notify you when registration opens.

about.hero_subtitle: Building infrastructure for a greener, more distributed future.
about.mission_desc: MugreCorp Inc is a green and decentralized technology company offering distributed computing services using Intel N100 mini PCs hosted in homes across Spain. We focus on sustainability, energy efficiency, and digital resilience.
about.vision_desc: Reducing costs and emissions through innovative and collaborative infrastructure. We embrace ecology by reducing material usage, energy consumption, and avoiding high-impact traditional data centers.
about.value1_desc: Every decision is measured by its environmental impact. No data centers, no energy waste.
about.value2_desc: Resilience comes from distribution. No single points of failure, no centralized control.
about.value3_desc: Hosts are the heart of MugreCorp. We gamify contribution to grow together.

legal.privacy_content: MugreCorp Inc is committed to protecting user privacy. We collect only the information necessary to provide our services: account data, service usage, and communication. We do not sell or share personal data with third parties for advertising purposes. We use industry-standard security measures to protect information. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting privacy@mugrecorp.com. This policy may be updated periodically. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of any changes.
legal.terms_content: By using MugreCorp Inc services, you accept these terms. Services are provided "as is" and "as available." You are responsible for your use of the infrastructure and must comply with all applicable laws. MugreCorp is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of services. Hosts agree to provide a safe and stable environment for nodes. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms. For disputes, the laws of Spain shall apply with jurisdiction in the competent courts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions? Want to join as a host? Write to us.
